summary: Frontend testing completed for photo card enhancements and Admin Wallet Management. All requested features verified working: touch scrolling (touch-action: pan-y), 15% larger cards (184x294px), 75/25 image/details layout, card flip functionality, admin wallet management with both credit and deduct modes, and deduction confirmation modal.

minor.issue: WebSocket connection returns 403 - known issue from previous iteration, not blocking functionality

context_for_next_testing_agent: All photo card enhancements and admin wallet management features are working correctly. WebSocket 403 error for analytics is a known non-blocking issue.

photo_card_touch_scrolling.details: touch-action: pan-y is set inline on page container, cards, and scroll container. Scroll test confirmed working (scrollY 0 -> 300)

photo_card_size_increase.details: Card dimensions verified at 184px x 294px (medium size config), matching the 15% larger specification

photo_card_75_25_layout.details: Cards use flex-[3] for image (75%) and flex-[1] for details (25%). Visual inspection confirms image takes majority of card height

photo_card_text_overflow.details: Text truncation working correctly with truncate class applied. No overflow issues detected

photo_card_flip.details: Card flip functionality working - flip button triggers flip, flip-back button returns to front

admin_wallet_management_page.details: /admin/wallet-management page loads correctly with all required elements

admin_user_search.details: User search works - found 3 results for 'test@blendlink.com'

admin_credit_mode.details: Add/Credit button switches to green mode, preview shows '+X BL Coins' and new balance calculation

admin_deduct_mode.details: Remove/Deduct button switches to red mode, preview shows '-X BL Coins', warning message displayed

admin_deduction_confirmation_modal.details: Confirmation modal appears when submitting deduction with: Recipient, Action (-50 BL), Current Balance, New Balance, Warning message, Cancel and Confirm buttons

admin_transaction_history.details: Recent Admin Adjustments section shows both credits (+) and deductions (-) with amounts, timestamps, and balance after
